canonical_definition: A multimodal, multilingual, and multi-task benchmark for evaluating MLLMs on visual web understanding and code generation, covering website VQA, mockup-to-code, and code editing in four languages.
papers: HESEIA: A community-based dataset for evaluating social biases in large language models, co-designed in real school settings inLatinAmerica
